boxDescription: The fuse block access door is located on the driver’s side edge of the instrument panel. Pull off the cover to access the fuse block.
The center instrument panel utility block is located underneath the instrument panel, to the left of the steering column.

boxDescription: The underhood fuse block is located in the engine compartment near the battery on the driver’s side of the vehicle. Lift the cover for access to the fuse/relay block.
